PLANNER_TEXT:
EDIT PLAN
Global Style: Kinetic caption-first reel with varied placement and readable pacing.
Audio Decision: Use audio_1 from 0.000 to 3.600 at full volume.
Caption Style: White bold captions with black stroke; only important words highlighted gold inline.
Visual Style: Reveal image_1 when Mahatma is mentioned and keep captions unobstructed.
Background Style: cinematic_red with subtle design accents.
Segmentation Rule: Use 3-4 word groups; allow stacked one-below-another words for emphasis beats.
Segment 1
Time: 0.000-3.600
Purpose: Present Mahatma Gandhi with animated captions and clear hierarchy.
Elements Used: audio_1, caption_track_1, image_1
Caption Decision: Important Words: Mahatma, peaceful.
Caption Decision: placement=lower_third; include stacked-word beat and animated entrances.
Visual Decision: image in upper half; caption safe-zone prioritized.
Animation Decision: image bounce entry; captions use slide_up and stack_words moment.
Placement Decision: auto-safe with background caption panel.
Timing Events:
- time: 0.000 event: opening caption enters
- time: 1.200 event: stacked words appear one below another
- time: 2.600 event: important keyword highlighted inline
Transition Out: soft fade.
Engagement Note: motion varies per line while readability stays stable.
ELEMENT_COMPACT:
version:1.0 video:1080x1920 fps=30 output=output/a2v_video.mp4 element:audio_1 type=music source_uri=assets/inputs/audio.wav timing=0.0-3.6 element:image_1 type=image about='this is Mahatma Gandhi' aim='animated entrance when mentioned' source_uri=assets/inputs/image.jpg element:caption_track_1 type=caption transcript='Gandhi walked and changed history forever.' word_timing_map=[{'text': 'Gandhi', 'start': 0.0, 'end': 0.6}, {'text': 'walked', 'start': 0.6, 'end': 1.2}, {'text': 'and', 'start': 1.2, 'end': 1.8}, {'text': 'changed', 'start': 1.8, 'end': 2.4}, {'text': 'history', 'start': 2.4, 'end': 3.0}, {'text': 'forever', 'start': 3.0, 'end': 3.6}] Grouping rule: Build caption groups adaptively from neighboring word gaps; split on long pauses, split at sentence boundaries (.!?), split when the next word starts with an uppercase letter, allow 1 to 5 words per group, and set each group start to the first word start and end to the next group first-word start (last group ends at last word end). Highlighting rule: highlight only the important word(s), never tint the full caption sentence.

walked and","font_size":58,"font_weight":"bold","color":"#FFFFFF","stroke_color":"#000000","stroke_width":3,"caption_placement":"lower_third","caption_animation":"slide_up","background_opacity":0.2,"background_color":"#000000"}},{"t_start":1.2,"t_end":2.4,"op":"show","params":{"text":"changed history forever","font_size":60,"font_weight":"bold","color":"#FFFFFF","stroke_color":"#000000","stroke_width":3,"caption_placement":"lower_third","text_mode":"stack_words","stack_line_step":86,"stack_stagger_s":0.08,"stack_hold_s":0.5,"important_words":["Mahatma"],"highlight_color":"#FFD84D","background_opacity":0.2,"background_color":"#000000"}},{"t_start":2.4,"t_end":2.9,"op":"show","params":{"text":"peaceful","font_size":64,"font_weight":"bold","color":"#FFD84D","importance_boost":1.16,"stroke_color":"#000000","stroke_width":3,"caption_placement":"lower_third","caption_animation":"pop","background_opacity":0.2,"background_color":"#000000"}},{"t_start":2.9,"t_end":3.6,"op":"show","params":{"text":"changed history forever","font_size":56,"font_weight":"bold","color":"#FFFFFF","stroke_color":"#000000","stroke_width":3,"caption_placement":"lower_third","caption_animation":"slide_up","background_opacity":0.2,"background_color":"#000000"}}]}]}
